Configuration for a Flask example application using Celery, specifying dependencies and build settings.

# Purpose
The file defines metadata and configuration for a Python project. The `[project]` section specifies the project's name, version, description, and dependencies, including `flask` and `celery[redis]`. It also indicates that the project should not be uploaded publicly. The `[build-system]` section specifies the build requirements and backend, using `flit_core`. The `[tool.flit.module]` section names the module as `task_app`. The `[tool.ruff]` section specifies the source directory as `src`.
